results.title: Mexico beat South Korea to become first nation to earn WC knockout spot
results.description: Mexico became the first nation to secure a spot in the World Cup round of 32 and they can thank a Seung-Gyu Kim goalkeeping error as South Korea were beaten 1-0 in Guadalajara.

results.title: Daley slammed for ‘letting down’ Blues rookie as ‘sad’ question emerges over axed star
results.description: Sea Eagles coach Kieran Foran is confident edge forward Haumole Olakau’atu can fight his way back into the NSW side for the State of Origin decider after the barnstorming back-rower was a shock omission for game two at the MCG.

results.title: 'Foot soldiers' storm EDSA in historic Manila Marathon
results.description: Last weekend, during the celebration of the Philippines' 128th Independence Day, people once again filled the streets, but this time, for a different cause.

results.title: Healthy again, Fil-Am prospect Hyder Amil eyes fresh start in UFC return
results.description: Filipino-American prospect Hyder Amil feels like a brand new man heading into his Octagon return on Sunday morning (Philippine time) at the Meta APEX in Las Vegas, Nevada.

results.title: How Scotland Fans Triggered a Beer Crisis in Boston During the World Cup
results.description: Boston is buzzing with excitement from Scotland's return to the FIFA World Cup, prompting a humorous 'beer crisis' among local bars.

results.title: Mexico edge South Korea 1-0 to qualify for World Cup last 32
results.description: Mexico next face Czech Republic at the Estadio Azteca on June 24.

results.title: Mexico goalkeeper's crazy double-save helps Mexico clinch World Cup knockouts
results.description: Mexico defended a 1-0 lead that put it into the knockout stage of the 2026 World Cup, but it needed a jaw-dropping double-save from Tala Rangel.
